creator: jerry.hicks@glenayre.com
text:
Follows is a uuencoded tarball of a modified version of the
xemacs20 port, hacked to use the neXtaw widgets and the OffiX
Dnd protocol.

Makes a nice addition to the WindowMaker clipbar as a drop target
for Dnd compatible file managers.

How-To-Repeat: 
The tarball should be extracted into your /usr/ports/editors
directory, then run 'make install'.  The port installation
will overwrite an existing XEmacs, so make sure you want to
do that before proceeding.
